channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Woman Arrested After Fatal Dispute over Market Stall in Muhoroni
item.description: In Kisumu County, police have started investigations following a tragic incident in Muhoroni on Monday, May 4, where a woman lost her life after a dispute over a market stall. The victim, identified a...

item.title: Targeted killing of former JUI MPA Muhammad Idrees in Charsadda raises security concerns
item.description: In a tragic incident in Charsadda, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, renowned religious scholar and former JUI-F MPA Maulana Sheikh Muhammad Idrees was killed in a targeted attack. The incident occurred in Utmanzai...

item.title: Congress Candidate Motab Shaikh Wins Farakka Seat After Voter Restoration
item.description: In the recent West Bengal Assembly elections, Congress candidate Motab Shaikh emerged victorious in the Farakka constituency after his name was initially removed from the electoral rolls during the Sp...

item.title: SA Vehicle Market Shows Growth Amid Rising Fuel Prices and Inflation Concerns
item.description: South Africa’s new vehicle market posted a strong performance in April 2026, with domestic sales climbing 13% year-on-year to 47,979 units — the best April since 2013. The growth reflects steady consu...

item.title: Notable Hair and Makeup Trends from the Met Gala 2026
item.description: The article highlights standout beauty looks seen at the Met Gala 2026, focusing on how hair and makeup complemented the event’s artistic and fashion-forward theme. Rather than just showcasing outfits...

item.title: Montreal Police Investigate Mock Beheading of Labour Minister Effigy During May Day Rally
item.description: Montreal police have launched an investigation after a May Day demonstration saw the mock beheading of an effigy representing Quebec's labour minister, Jean Boulet. Protesters used a guillotine to cut...

item.title: Tagbilaran priest chosen as bishop decides not to accept appointment
item.description: Fr. Gerardo Saco, who was serving as the administrator of the Diocese of Tagbilaran, has decided not to proceed with his appointment as the eighth bishop of the diocese. He was selected by Pope Leo XI...

item.title: Met Gala 2026: Key Red Carpet Arrivals and Highlights
item.description: The Met Gala 2026, held on the first Monday in May, marked the opening of the Metropolitan Museum of Art’s Costume Institute exhibition titled 'Costume Art'. This exhibition explores depictions of the...

item.title: State Failures and Social Disorder Fuel Anti-Migrant Sentiments in South Africa
item.description: In the week marking South Africa's 32nd Freedom Day, tensions around illegal migration surged, with protests ranging from peaceful marches to violent clashes. Many South Africans view African migrants...

item.title: Preview and Tips for Warwick Farm Races This Wednesday
item.description: Super Bright, a seven-year-old mare trained by Nathan Doyle, is set to return to racing at Warwick Farm on Wednesday in the Catanach's Jewellers Handicap over 1100 metres. Having won at Canterbury in ...

item.title: India, Vietnam expected to discuss defence cooperation including BrahMos missiles
item.description: Vietnamese President To Lam is scheduled to visit New Delhi from May 5 to 7, 2026, where he is expected to hold talks on strengthening defence ties with India. Among the topics likely to be discussed ...

item.title: Jeremiah Kioni Predicts William Ruto May Form New Party Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Jubilee Party deputy leader Jeremiah Kioni has stated that President William Ruto will not seek re-election under the United Democratic Alliance (UDA) ticket. According to Kioni, Ruto is likely to for...

item.title: Rihanna and A$AP Rocky Close Met Gala 2026 Red Carpet with Bold Artistic Fashion
item.description: Global music superstar Rihanna and rapper A$AP Rocky once again prove say dem be major force for fashion world as dem close the 2026 Met Gala red carpet with strong presence and artistic outfits. The ...

item.title: Space Engineers Launches Major Economy 2 Update and Optional Pack
item.description: Keen Software House has released the highly anticipated Economy 2 update for Space Engineers, now available across all platforms. This free update introduces the largest economy overhaul in the game's...

item.title: Two IBEDC staff abducted on duty along Ibadan-Ijebu Ode Road
item.description: The Ibadan Electricity Distribution Company (IBEDC) don announce say two of their staff wey dey work for Ogun area don get kidnapped. The incident happen on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, along the Oyo St...

item.title: Suluhu Urges Kenya and Tanzania to Work Together on Handling Cross-Border Activism
item.description: Tanzanian President Samia Suluhu Hassan has called for stronger cooperation between Kenya and Tanzania to deal with what she termed as disruptive activism, especially among youth movements crossing bo...

item.title: Pakistan’s PM expresses solidarity with UAE after missile and drone attacks
item.description: On Tuesday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif issued a strong condemnation of recent drone and missile attacks targeting civilian infrastructure in the United Arab Emirates (UAE). Expressing full solidari...

item.title: Alberta court upholds provincial authority over transgender youth health restrictions
item.description: Advocates for transgender youth in Alberta have faced a setback in their legal fight against provincial restrictions on medical care for minors. The groups Egale and Skipping Stone sought to challenge...

item.title: Tariq Malik named among global digital identity leaders by Okta Ventures
item.description: Former Nadra Chairman Tariq Malik has been recognised among the world’s top 25 identity leaders by Okta Ventures, the investment arm of US-based identity management company Okta. The list honours indi...

item.title: Disparities in Ontario Teacher Certification Math Test Across Race, Language, and Age
item.description: Recent data from Ontario’s mandatory math test for teacher certification reveals significant disparities among candidates based on race, age, and language. Overall, about 68 per cent of candidates pas...
